title: camunium exoticum
side_effects: Camunium exoticum can have side effects if used improperly, such as respiratory problems, skin irritation, and gastrointestinal issues. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can lead to nausea, vomiting, and even organ damage. In severe cases, improper use of camunium exoticum can cause anaphylaxis, a life-threatening allergic reaction that requires immediate medical attention. It's essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant, as even small amounts can have adverse effects on individuals with pre-existing health conditions.
